fields.name: chatHistory
fields.comment: Formatted chat history of previous turns (user and assistant)

fields.name: inputStream
fields.comment: Uploaded document stream for OCR; null means no document is attached

fields.name: formattedQuery
fields.comment: Assembled query combining chat history and user message

fields.name: ocrContent
fields.comment: Raw text extracted from the uploaded document via OCR

fields.name: parsedDraft
fields.comment: Parsed procurement request draft extracted from document

fields.name: parseFeedback
fields.comment: Parse status message for the caller
